subject: [PATCH v1 02/17] fuse: prepare for passthrough of inode operations

2026-04-20.patch_summary: This patch prepares the fuse file system to pass through inode operations by introducing a new field, ops_mask, in the FUSE_DEV_IOC_BACKING_OPEN ioctl input argument. This allows for the attachment of a backing file to a fuse inode without an open file, enabling passthrough of some inode operations. The patch also adds checks for non-regular backing files and requires a filesystem with FUSE_PASSTHROUGH_INO support for setting up passthrough of any inode operations.
